Secrets: SOPS-encrypted in git
Archive: git mv enclaves/ --> archive/

and params.schema.yaml.
The agent customizes from there.

div.div:
When git-state is enabled, tntc deploy:
1. Checks for uncommitted changes
2. Refuses if working tree is dirty
3. Ensures git and disk agree before pushing to K8s

div.div: All three layers must agree. If they diverge, git wins.
